name: Sprig
description: Sprig in-product microsurveys and session replays for user research

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Sprig
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Sprig → Settings → API Keys → Create API Key
